data.body: Standing eval suite built + wired into the shipped Inspect-AI seam (rebar.llm.eval): eval_specs/plan-review-{finder,verifier,isf-finder}.eval.yaml with the three case types (recall/false-accept/false-fire) across all THREE corpuses (DSO/snap/rebar), seeded from the REAL observed-false-positives taxonomy (FP1-FP7 + 11 modes + the sycophancy false-negative axis). Pass-2 DISCRIMINATION pairs (acc1) + ISF recall/justified-descope (681b) + T12 recall+suppression DISCRIMINATION pair. Deterministic gating scorers + cross-family llm-judge + frozen gold_set per spec. FP6/FP7 anti-FP tuning encoded into the verifier/T2/A1 prompts. README.plan-review.md documents the suite + the human-adjudication process; test_plan_review_evals.py validates offline. NOTE (honest scope): the gold-subset labels are a best-effort SEED — the GATING human-adjudicated gold + threshold/judge calibration from real REVIEW_RESULT-sidecar dogfood data is the explicit POST-IMPLEMENTATION calibration the epic defers; this suite ENABLES it.
